name: deepseek-models
description: DeepSeek chat + reasoner models (OpenAI-compatible). Bring your own DeepSeek API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: DeepSeek API Key
x-meta.help: Your DeepSeek API key. Leave empty to fall back to the DEEPSEEK_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: A DeepSeek model id. Empty = resolved from live /v1/models discovery.

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: Optional override of the DeepSeek base URL. Empty uses https://api.deepseek.com/v1.
